name: Exclusion of Employer HSA Contributions

eligibility.description: Employee must be an eligible individual under section 223(c)(1) (covered by a High Deductible Health Plan).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employer contributions to an employee's Health Savings Account (HSA) are excluded from the employee's gross income, up to the annual statutory limits.
